reasoning: The all-time high for Solana was $293.31 in January 2025 (or $260 in 2021, depending on the index/exchange, but under $300 regardless). It has not reached $350 at any point this year. As of October 24-26, 2025, Solana is trading around $190-$195. With only 5 days remaining in the month, an 80% price increase for an asset of this market capitalization is exceedingly unlikely barring an unprecedented historical market-wide event. The probability of it reaching $350 in October is near zero. I am setting it at the lower bound reflecting this near-impossibility.
